dsl_rule.translation_notes: Short upper shadow approximated as upper_wick < 1% of range. Bull market context represented by close > sma_50. Exit condition set to bearish reversal (close below SMA_50) as original exit conditions were marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Success rate of 5.79% in bull markets used to set conservative stop loss at 5.95% average decline.

source_rule_text: Short Upper Shadow: A candle with a short upper shadow in bull market conditions
